About

Wayfinder
Your Personal Travel Universe

The Vegvísir is an ancient Icelandic compass carried by those who ventured into storms and unknown waters. Eight runic staves — eight possible paths — radiating outward in all directions. "If this sign is carried, one will never lose one's way in storms or bad weather, even when the way is not known."

The Vegvísir guides those lost in storms. May you always find your way.

Phase 1 · Built with Claude

Your Profile

Format: City, ST — used to mark your home state on the dashboard
Get a free key at console.anthropic.com. Only needed when using Wayfinder outside of Cowork. Stored locally in your browser only.
Google Cloud Console → Enable Maps JavaScript API → Credentials → Create API Key → restrict to your site → paste here. Stored locally only.
Setup: Google Cloud Console → Create project → Enable Google Drive API + Google Picker API → Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Web app) → add your site URL to Authorized JavaScript Origins → copy the Client ID here.
Paste the URL of your 09--TRAVEL & EXPERIENCES folder. The Drive picker will open there directly instead of My Drive root.

Appearance

Dark Mode
Switch between light and dark theme

Work Trips

Include in app-wide stats
When ON, work trip countries count toward Dashboard totals and World Map

Trips View

Show Adventures in All Trips
Adventures appear in the All Trips view alongside regular trips
Show Work Trips in All Trips
Business travel appears alongside personal trips

Sync & Data

Data is stored in this browser and backed up to the cloud. Use the sync button above if data appears missing after a fresh install.

New Trip

What kind of trip is this?
🚗
Road Trip
Driving a route — scenic drives, stops along the way
🏕️
Camping
Sleeping in nature — tent, RV, van life, glamping, overlanding
🎒
Adventure
Physical challenge in nature — backpacking, wilderness, trails
🌆
Getaway
Short break — city, beach, resort, cabin or weekend escape
🌍
International
Crossing borders — multi-country, weeks abroad, long journeys
🎪
Event
Going for something specific — concert, festival, wedding, reunion
